accurate.why: Accurately describes all key provisions including the five-parcel conveyance, county eligibility requirements, payment terms, management restrictions, reconveyance limits, existing rights, and deadlines.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims. Reference to the John D. Dingell Jr. Conservation, Management, and Recreation Act is accurate.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes the conveyance of federal lands to county ownership.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes reconveyance restrictions, existing rights (flowage easements, minerals, permits), deed restrictions, indemnification, and land-must-be-whole requirement.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
